example: All of you have to keep your mics on mute during the online class.
zh: 靜音，將麥克風關閉聲音。
ja: ミュート、マイクの音を消すこと。

example: Maybe you have some network problem, please check it.
zh: 網路問題，網路連線不穩定或中斷。
ja: ネットワークの問題、インターネット接続が不安定または切断されていること。

example: We will log out of the class if there is a network issue.
ja: ログアウト、システムやプラットフォームから退出すること。

example: We will be sincere now and pay attention to our studies.
ja: 誠実な、真心のこもった態度。

example: He used to make an excuse to avoid doing his homework.
ja: 言い訳、言い逃れの理由。

example: He took a holiday from school by pretending to be sick.
The teacher will check the notebooks tomorrow.
ja: ノート、宿題やメモを書く本。

example: After getting scolding from his teacher, he decided to complete his work.
He felt relieved after completing all his homework.
He was very tired after working all night.
Completing work on time helps to escape the burden of doing everything later.
zh: 負擔，沉重的責任或壓力。
ja: 負担、重い責任やプレッシャー。

example: You should cooperate with your teachers during online classes.
Some kids don't have the facility to study online.
Please pay attention to the studies during class.
He used to ignore his homework and play instead.
Don't dare to be absent tomorrow at all.
